endpoints.name: Play By Play Simulation
endpoints.description: Gets simulated live play-by-play of NFL games, covering the Conference Championship games on January 21, 2018.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SPORTSDATA_API_KEY}} with your SPORTSDATA API KEY. Replace {{FORMAT}} with a real format. Replace {{NUMBEROFPLAYS}} with a real numberofplays.
